narrative.headline: Time Suspended
copy: Introduced 15 years ago, Kronos Audio's turntables are the standard by which every analogue front end is measured.
Kronos are known for their counter-rotating dual platter suspended turntable design, which provides unparalleled stability and extracts more musical information from vinyl records.
This patented unique design minimizes torque forces induced vibrations, resulting in a more organic and clear sound.
A design that extracts not just sound
but the organic truth of music.
Our goal has always been singular:
to achieve a non-compromise analogue playback quality in all our products. From the SPARTA entry level turntable to our flagship DISCOVERY,
from our power Super Capacitor Power Supplies, to our patented technology RS tonearms and from our racks, every design choice has constantly pointed in this direction.

narrative.headline: Awarded over time
copy: Kronos has received over 100 Best Sound of Show awards, glowing reviews from renowned reviewers all over the world,
as well as Product of the Year Awards from publications such as HIFI+, Harry Pearson Soundings, Positive Feedback, Enjoy the Music, Absolute Sound, The Audio Analyst and AV Showrooms… to name a few.

narrative.headline: Beyond space and time
copy: In an audiophile world constantly bombarded with never-ending marketing plows and so-called innovations, Kronos has been a steady presence.

Our registry shows that 90% of KRONOS owners still own a KRONOS today.  We have constantly worked at improving our products and most of these improvements are retrofittable over time… a 15 years old KRONOS PRO can easily be brought up to current spec.
We do not believe in mk1, mk2, mk3 planned obsolescence. A Kronos turntable is an investment in the future.

narrative.headline: ATime will bring us together
copy: Kronos is renowned for its ultimate customer service.
Countless Kronos owners have become friends in music. Our pledge to keep our family happy over time.
We invite you to take the time to look deeper in the world of KRONOS

slides.title: Best Sound of Show
slides.quote: A reference-level analogue front end with astonishing stability.

slides.title: Product of the Year
slides.quote: A turntable that consistently reveals deeper musical truth.

narrative.headline: The Kronos World
copy: Join a curated family of connoisseurs.
We invite you to look deeper.
